title: geranium libani
intro: Geranium libani, also known as the Lebanon geranium, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Lebanon and Syria. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Geranium libani include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Geranium libani can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
